chapters.title: Introductions
chapters.objective: Help the learner introduce themselves and ask simple personal questions.

lessons.title: Say Hello And Introduce Yourself
lessons.goal: Introduce yourself with your name, country, and basic role.

exercises.prompt: Teach the learner the model sentence: Hello, my name is Ana. I am from Kenya.
Ask the learner to repeat a short self-introduction.
exercises.expected_answer: Hello, my name is ____. I am from ____.

exercises.prompt: Roleplay meeting a new classmate and asking their name.

success_criteria: Learner can say their name and origin in one short response.
Learner can ask another person their name.

review_rule.trigger: Repeat if the learner struggles with be verb or self-introduction order.

lessons.title: Talk About Daily Routine
lessons.goal: Describe a simple daily routine in the present tense.

exercises.prompt: Teach three routine verbs and a sample sentence about a daily routine.
Ask the learner what they do in the morning and evening.

success_criteria: Learner can describe a two-step routine.
Learner uses simple present with acceptable intelligibility.

review_rule.trigger: Review if routine verbs are missing or present tense is unstable.

chapters.title: Daily Life
chapters.objective: Support simple real-world interactions such as shopping, food, and directions.

lessons.title: Buy Food At A Cafe
lessons.goal: Order food politely and respond to a simple follow-up question.

exercises.prompt: Roleplay ordering at a cafe as a customer.
Summarize the best ordering sentence the learner can reuse.

success_criteria: Learner can order one item politely.
Learner can answer a quantity or drink-size question.

review_rule.trigger: Review if the learner avoids polite request forms.
